evidence: "Good movie. Damon is great in it. Foster's villain is cookie cutter evil... Worth a look, especially if you're a sci-fi fan."
"...doesn't add anything new to those who are well versed in the subject."
"...bored halfway through and I kept checking the time to see how much longer I had to go."
"...had quite a few interesting action sequences."
"...production values are great. Narration is very effective."
"...cinematography, sound, animations, etc-every technical aspect of this film excellent..."
"Small Town Monsters produces high quality docs on cryptids and the paranormal..."
"Small Town Monsters continues to 'up their game'..."
"...spooky, eerie, and interesting. Good production values and scary reenactments."
"...very emotional show, but the season was only three episodes, which left me wanting more."
"...some sad, make you think about aging, moments in the first half..."

summary: The user enjoys documentaries and horror-themed content, particularly those produced by Small Town Monsters, and appreciates high production quality. They prefer straightforward narratives and have mixed feelings about pacing, indicating a balance between engaging action and slower storytelling moments.
